nodes.name: api-reference.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive VideoDB Python SDK API reference covering Connection, Collection, Video, Audio, Image, Timeline, SearchResult, Meeting, and RTStream/Capture objects, including all methods, properties, parameters, enums, and exception types.

nodes.name: capture-reference.md
nodes.summary: Detailed technical reference for the VideoDB Capture subsystem, documenting WebSocket events, CaptureSession and CaptureClient classes, Channels, event persistence (JSONL), and integration with RTStreams and AI pipelines.

nodes.name: capture.md
nodes.summary: Conceptual getting-started guide for the VideoDB Capture feature, walking through setup, the complete capture workflow from connection to shutdown, and usage of the ws_listener.py helper script.

nodes.name: editor.md
nodes.summary: Practical guide to VideoDB's Timeline editing API, covering core concepts, building timelines with video clips, adding text/audio/image/caption overlays, compiling and streaming, and complete workflow examples with known limitations.

nodes.name: generative.md
nodes.summary: Guide to VideoDB's generative media capabilities including image, video, and audio (music/sound effects/TTS) generation, LLM text generation and scene analysis, and dubbing/translation workflows with complete code examples.

nodes.name: rtstream-reference.md
nodes.summary: Detailed API reference for VideoDB RTStream (real-time stream) objects, covering connection methods, starting/stopping, AI pipeline configuration (audio/visual indexing, transcription), scene indexing, events, alerts, and WebSocket integration.

nodes.name: rtstream.md
nodes.summary: High-level overview guide for VideoDB RTStream, describing use cases, quick start examples, and the two stream source types (RTSP/RTMP streams and Capture sessions).

nodes.name: search.md
nodes.summary: Guide to VideoDB's video search and indexing capabilities, covering spoken word and scene indexing, semantic/keyword/scene search types, metadata filtering, cross-collection search, and working with search results including shot playback and clip extraction.

nodes.name: streaming.md
nodes.summary: Guide to VideoDB streaming and playback, covering single-video streaming with subtitles and segments, timeline composition streaming, search-result streaming, audio playback, and complete multi-step workflow examples.

nodes.name: use-cases.md
nodes.summary: Curated catalog of VideoDB use cases organized by capability area: video search/highlights, video enhancement, real-time capture (desktop/meeting), live stream intelligence (RTSP/RTMP), content moderation, and platform integration with delivery/transcoding.
